zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs於1165年11月出生在克羅埃西亞時，他的父親Friedrich I. 'Barbarossa' römisch-deutscher Kaiser42歲，母親Béatrice Ire de Bourgogne22歲。他於1186年1月27日與Costanza von Hauteville在義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1197年9月28日在義大利西西利亞梅西那梅西那享年31歲，埋葬在義大利西西利亞梅西那梅西那。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs于1165年11月出生在克罗埃西亚时，他的父亲Friedrich I. 'Barbarossa' römisch-deutscher Kaiser42岁，母亲Béatrice Ire de Bourgogne22岁。他于1186年1月27日与Costanza von Hauteville在意大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1197年9月28日在意大利西西利亞梅西那梅西那享年31岁，埋葬在意大利西西利亞梅西那梅西那。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: VI.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs was born in November 1165, in Croatia, his father, Friedrich I. 'Barbarossa' römisch-deutscher Kaiser, was 42 and his mother, Béatrice Ire de Bourgogne, was 22. He married Costanza von Hauteville on 27 January 1186, in Milan, Lombardy, Italy. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 28 September 1197, in Messina, Messina, Sicily, Italy, at the age of 31, and was buried in Messina, Messina, Sicily, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs est né en novembre 1165, à Croatie, son père, Friedrich I. 'Barbarossa' römisch-deutscher Kaiser, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Béatrice Ire de Bourgogne, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Costanza von Hauteville le 27 janvier 1186, à Milano, Lombardia, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 28 septembre 1197, à Messina, Messina, Sicile, Italie, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterré à Messina, Messina, Sicile, Italie.

historicEvents.description: Aachen, das 1166 durch Kaiser Friedrich I. Barbarossa mit dem Karlsprivileg das Stadtrecht verliehen bekam und Reichsstadt wurde, diente vom frühen Mittelalter bis zur Reformation als Krönungsort zahlreicher römisch-deutscher Könige und Kaiser.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs im November 1165 in Kroatien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Friedrich I. 'Barbarossa' römisch-deutscher Kaiser 42 und seine Mutter Béatrice Ire de Bourgogne 22. Er hat am 27. Januar 1186 in Milano, Lombardei, Italien Costanza von Hauteville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 28. September 1197 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Messina, Messina, Sizilien, Italien und wurde in Messina, Messina, Sizilien, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs è nato il nel novembre 1165 nel Croazia, il suo padre, Friedrich I. 'Barbarossa' römisch-deutscher Kaiser, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Béatrice Ire de Bourgogne, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Costanza von Hauteville il 27 gennaio 1186, nel Milano, Lombardia, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 28 settembre 1197, nel Messina, Messina, Sicilia, Italia, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolto a Messina, Messina, Sicilia, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichsが1165年11月にクロアチアで生まれた時，父Friedrich I. 'Barbarossa' römisch-deutscher Kaiserは42歳，母Béatrice Ire de Bourgogneは22歳であった。1186年1月27日にイタリアロンバーディアミラノでCostanza von Hautevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1197年9月28日にイタリアシシリアメシナメシナで31歳で死去し，イタリアシシリアメシナメシナにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs(이)가 1165년 11월 크로아티아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Friedrich I. 'Barbarossa' römisch-deutscher Kaiser(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Béatrice Ire de Bourgogne(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1186년 1월 27일 이탈리아 롬바디아 미랜오에서 Costanza von Hauteville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1197년 9월 28일 이탈리아 시실리야 메시나 메시나에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 시실리야 메시나 메시나에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs nasceu em novembro de 1165, em Croácia, seu pai, Friedrich I. 'Barbarossa' römisch-deutscher Kaiser, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Béatrice Ire de Bourgogne, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Costanza von Hauteville em 27 de janeiro de 1186, em Milano, Lombardia, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 28 de setembro de 1197, em Messina, Messina, Sicilia, Itália, com 31 anos, e foi sepultado em Messina, Messina, Sicilia, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs родился ноябрь 1165 г. в местности Хорватия, его отцу по имени Friedrich I. 'Barbarossa' römisch-deutscher Kaiser было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Béatrice Ire de Bourgogne, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Costanza von Hauteville 27 января 1186 г. в местности милано, ломбардя, Италия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 28 сентября 1197 г. в местности мессина, мессина, сисиля, Италия в возрасте 31 год и был похоронен в местности мессина, мессина, сисиля, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs nació en noviembre de 1165, en Croacia, su papá, Friedrich I. 'Barbarossa' römisch-deutscher Kaiser, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Béatrice Ire de Bourgogne, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Costanza von Hauteville el 27 de enero de 1186, en Milano, Lombardia, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 28 de septiembre de 1197, en Messina, Messina, Sicilia, Italia, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultado en Messina, Messina, Sicilia, Italia.
